name: 2D Binary Search — Matrix Search, Search Space

metadata.career_relevance: Core 2D Binary Search — Matrix Search, Search Space.

hook.what_you_will_build: 2D Binary Search — Matrix Search, Search Space

key_takeaways: Row-column sorted matrix: start from top-right; go left if too big, down if too small
Row sorted, rows ascending: treat as 1D with index/cols row, index%cols col
Kth smallest in sorted matrix: binary search on value range
Find K-th smallest: count elements <= mid; if count>=k: hi=mid else lo=mid+1
Sparse matrix search: binary search on row then column
